result.stdout:
Description:
  Spelunk.NET - MCP server for .NET code analysis

Usage:
  Spelunk.Server [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  stdio  Run in stdio mode (JSON-RPC over standard input/output)
  sse    Run SSE server or manage background instance

commands.payload:
Description:
  Spelunk.NET - MCP server for .NET code analysis

Usage:
  Spelunk.Server [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  stdio  Run in stdio mode (JSON-RPC over standard input/output)
  sse    Run SSE server or manage background instance

result.stdout:
Description:
  Run SSE server or manage background instance

Usage:
  Spelunk.Server sse [command] [options]

Options:
  -p, --port <port>  Port for SSE server [default: 3333]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  stop     Stop background SSE server
  status   Check SSE server status
  restart  Restart background SSE server
  logs     View SSE server logs

commands.payload:
Description:
  Run SSE server or manage background instance

Usage:
  Spelunk.Server sse [command] [options]

Options:
  -p, --port <port>  Port for SSE server [default: 3333]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  stop     Stop background SSE server
  status   Check SSE server status
  restart  Restart background SSE server
  logs     View SSE server logs

result.stdout:
Description:
  View SSE server logs

Usage:
  Spelunk.Server sse logs [options]

Options:
  -f, --follow    Follow log output
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
